title: Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded
description: This is a Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes several performance and graphical mods as well as voice chat and Arcanus (a mod about wizardry). Have fun playing Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
body: This is the Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes several performance and graphical mods as well as Yung's structures, voice chat, and blast (A mod about explosives). Feel free to add whatever client side mods you want as long as they apply to the rules. Have fun playing Mangrove SMP Season 3: Modded.
